_about: Round-2 adversarial out-of-corpus baseline (issue #34). Headline metric is the share of the 39 probes that returned a CONFIDENT specific torque for a non-corpus target: ~15% (6/39), 5 of 6 reproducing 3/3 @ 0.85-0.99 conf. `recharacterization` is the firsthand 39-probe x3 driver output preserved from docs/quality-eval/hallucination_recharacterization.json (probes returning >=1 confident torque over 3 runs = 9; the 6/39 headline counts the consistent reproducers). Gate compares hallucination_rate against `headline`, lower-is-better, with `tolerance`.
